title: Graphic Monoline
description: Ce style se définit par un tracé vectoriel monoligne net et uniforme, créant des sujets entièrement à travers des contours colorés parfaitement géométriques et sans ombrage. Dépourvue de remplissages solides ou de dégradés, la composition s'appuie sur des hachures parallèles précises, des courbes concentriques et une abstraction minimaliste sur un fond plat, produisant une esthétique de design graphique hautement systématique et moderne.
description_en: This style is defined by crisp, uniform monoline vector work, creating subjects entirely through unshaded, perfectly geometric colored outlines. Devoid of solid fills or gradients, the composition relies on precise parallel hatching, concentric curves, and minimalist abstraction against a flat background, resulting in a highly systematic and modern graphic design aesthetic.
description_fr: Ce style se définit par un tracé vectoriel monoligne net et uniforme, créant des sujets entièrement à travers des contours colorés parfaitement géométriques et sans ombrage. Dépourvue de remplissages solides ou de dégradés, la composition s'appuie sur des hachures parallèles précises, des courbes concentriques et une abstraction minimaliste sur un fond plat, produisant une esthétique de design graphique hautement systématique et moderne.
prompt: A pristine digital vector illustration and pure monoline graphic design featuring a {{subject}} constructed entirely from uniform, mathematically perfect colored outlines. The {{subject}} is rendered without any solid fills, gradients, or volumetric shading, existing as a highly stylized wireframe of crisp, constant-weight strokes. The rendering technique relies on absolute geometric precision, utilizing parallel linear hatching, concentric curves, perfect circles, and sharp angles to define the internal structure and silhouette of the {{subject}}. The environment and the {{subject}} are completely flat, situated in an unlit 2D space with zero shadows, highlights, or light source interaction. The color science is strictly limited to the linework itself, which vibrantly displays a palette of {{primary_color}}, {{accent_color}}, and {{secondary_color}} against a cohesive negative space that acts as the unpainted background. The texture is perfectly smooth and digitally pristine, devoid of any film grain, paper fiber, or brushstrokes. Every contour is a continuous, pressure-insensitive vector path, creating a systematic, playful, and modern aesthetic reminiscent of contemporary iconography and mid-century modern pattern design. The spatial dynamics are strictly orthographic and abstract, flattening all depth cues into a purely decorative, rhythmic arrangement of lines. The visual language distills complex forms into their most basic, recognizable geometric equivalents, turning the {{subject}} into a masterclass of minimalist line work. The interplay of the colored strokes against the empty space creates a breathable, lightweight visual rhythm that feels both technical and artistic. The entire composition must be FULL BLEED to all four corners, occupying the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space with NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, and NO canvas edges. The environment must stretch entirely across the canvas, seamlessly distributing the monoline motifs and extending the geometric pattern indefinitely.
prompt_removebg: A pristine digital vector illustration and pure monoline graphic design featuring a {{subject}} constructed entirely from uniform, mathematically perfect colored outlines, rendered against a flat {{background_color}} backdrop. The {{subject}} is rendered without any solid fills, gradients, or volumetric shading, existing as a highly stylized wireframe of crisp, constant-weight strokes composited on a clean {{background_color}} surface. The rendering technique relies on absolute geometric precision, utilizing parallel linear hatching, concentric curves, perfect circles, and sharp angles to define the internal structure and silhouette of the {{subject}}. The environment and the {{subject}} are completely flat, situated in an unlit 2D space with zero shadows, highlights, or light source interaction. The color science is strictly limited to the linework itself, which vibrantly displays a palette of {{primary_color}}, {{accent_color}}, and {{secondary_color}}. The {{background_color}} acts as the unified negative space, visible through every unclosed path and empty interior of the {{subject}}. The texture is perfectly smooth and digitally pristine, devoid of any film grain, paper fiber, or brushstrokes. Every contour is a continuous, pressure-insensitive vector path, creating a systematic, playful, and modern aesthetic reminiscent of contemporary iconography and mid-century modern pattern design. The spatial dynamics are strictly orthographic and abstract, flattening all depth cues into a purely decorative, rhythmic arrangement of lines. The visual language distills complex forms into their most basic, recognizable geometric equivalents, turning the {{subject}} into a masterclass of minimalist line work. The interplay of the colored strokes against the empty space creates a breathable, lightweight visual rhythm that feels both technical and artistic. The edges of the {{subject}} interact seamlessly with the {{background_color}}, with intentional overflow allowed where parts of the {{subject}} can extend beyond the visible frame and be cropped by the image boundaries.
background_prompt: A pure background environment rendered in a pristine digital vector monoline style. The scene consists entirely of uniform, mathematically perfect colored outlines in {{primary_color}}, {{accent_color}}, and {{secondary_color}}, without any solid fills, gradients, or volumetric shading. The composition features abstract geometric patterns, rhythmic parallel hatching, and flowing concentric curves that create a flattened, decorative 2D landscape. The space is completely unlit and smooth, relying solely on the interplay of crisp, pressure-insensitive vector lines to establish a systematic, playful, and modern atmospheric depth across the entire edge-to-edge canvas.
background_prompt_removebg: A pure background environment rendered in a pristine digital vector monoline style, composited against a flat {{background_color}} surface. The scene consists entirely of uniform, mathematically perfect colored outlines in {{primary_color}}, {{accent_color}}, and {{secondary_color}}, without any solid fills, gradients, or volumetric shading. The composition features abstract geometric patterns, rhythmic parallel hatching, and flowing concentric curves that create a flattened, decorative 2D landscape. Positioned in the foreground is an ornamental border made of continuous, perfectly geometric monoline vector paths, framing an invisible central space to create a sense of flattened depth. Both the background patterns and the geometric foreground frame transition seamlessly into the {{background_color}} backdrop, utilizing the flat surface as dynamic negative space.
